body:
When designer Kelly Finley needed to transform a bedroom in her Georgia lake house into both a serene guest suite and a fully functional home office, she turned to our LGM Wall Bed-an elegant solution for modern, multifunctional living.

With a custom pink lacquer finish and COM upholstery, the piece reflects Kelly's distinctive blend of bold color and refined luxury‚Äîcreating a space that transitions effortlessly between work and rest.

"It was a great joy working with Resource Furniture to create what I consider to be a very attractive and super functional wall bed," Kelly shares.
